title: Wells Fargo Cuts Targets and Coverage on Carnival and More
text: After last week's rally, markets have been under pressure this week, giving more credence to a bear market rally.

title: Deckers (DECK) Stock Jumps 4.8%: Will It Continue to Soar?
text: Deckers (DECK) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.

title: Deckers Outdoor: An Attractive Firm Posting Strong Growth
text: Deckers Outdoor Corporation experienced a lot of downside over the past few months as investors fear the broader economy. Though this could harm the company, management has remained bullish and the company's fundamentals so far remain robust.

title: HOKA® INVITES HUMANS ACROSS THE GLOBE TO LACE UP AND FLY WITH THEIR FIRST GLOBAL CAMPAIGN, FLY HUMAN FLY™
text: The Leading Performance Running Brand Unveils a New Global Ad Campaign, Calling All Humans to Experience the Transformative Power of a Run GOLETA, Calif. , June 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- HOKA®, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), launches a new global brand platform, FLY HUMAN FLY.

title: 5 Shoes & Retail Apparel Stocks to Eye in a Prospering Industry
text: The Shoes and Retail Apparel industry looks prim on gains from strong consumer demand, product innovation and digital growth. These aspects bode well for DECK, SKX, SHOO, CAL and RCKY.

title: 5 Stocks To Watch For June 13, 2022
text: Some of the stocks that may grab investor focus today are: Wall Street expects Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) to post quarterly earnings at $1.37 per share on revenue of $11.67 billion after the closing bell. Oracle shares gained 0.2% to $67.25 in after-hours trading.

title: Deckers Brands Promotes Angela Ogbechie to Chief Supply Chain Officer
text: David Lafitte to Step Down as Chief Operating Officer GOLETA, Calif. , June 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing and distributing innovative footwear, apparel and accessories, today announced the promotion of Angela Ogbechie to the newly created role of Chief Supply Chain Officer, effective June 24, 2022.

title: Latest SANUK & GRATEFUL DEAD™ Collection Offers Summertime Slip-On and Sandals
text: New Styles Feature Eco-Conscious Materials & Classic Dead Head Details GOLETA, Calif. , June 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Sanuk , a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), today announced the sixth iteration of its ongoing collaboration with iconic rock band the Grateful Dead, powered by Warner Music Artist Services.
